hooks.name: claude-md-audit-trigger
hooks.description: If thresholds suggest CLAUDE.md may be stale and no cooldown blocks, appends an audit suggestion to pending.md.

hooks.name: power-steering-drain
hooks.description: Drains /run/back2base/power-steering/pending.md into additionalContext; truncates after read.

hooks.name: power-steering-tick
hooks.description: Touches /run/back2base/power-steering/.tick so the daemon wakes only on real tool activity.

hooks.name: claude-md-audit-tally
hooks.description: Appends Edit/Write/MultiEdit events to edits.jsonl for the staleness-audit heuristic.

hooks.name: ddog-eval-tooluse
hooks.description: Accumulates per-turn tool-call counters for the Datadog efficiency evaluator.

hooks.name: ddog-eval-stop
hooks.description: Queues a backgrounded Python worker that submits four custom Datadog LLM Observability evaluations for the just-finished turn (skill_choice, memory_hygiene, efficiency, answer_quality).
